scene.dramatic_question: Will Abhishek give Colonel James Preston what they want?
scene.source_of_conflict: rarely engages directly; would request specific tactical missions through Whelan; Hollow Choir intelligence; reliable Hudson-pass route reports
scene.yes_outcome: Agreement reached, disposition improves, new options open.
scene.no_outcome: Request refused, disposition drops, alternatives force themselves.
scene.transition_hint: After resolution: new scene based on outcome and NPC reactions.

npcs.voice: Preston speaks briefly and stands too still. He does not raise his voice. When he asks a question, he looks at the answer rather than the person giving it. The breakthrough cost has stripped what most people would recognize as personality from his manner; what remains is exact attention and an unsettling absence of the small social anxieties that govern other lives. He is courteous. He is not warm.

social_block.motivation: rarely engages directly; would request specific tactical missions through Whelan; Hollow Choir intelligence; reliable Hudson-pass route reports

hooks: Whelan summons the player on Preston's behalf
the player witnesses one of Preston's Warped meetings by accident
tribute caravan to Mount Tremper requires escort
Preston suspects a captain's loyalty and wants quiet verification

npcs.role: de facto military commander of Catskill Throne
npcs.voice: Whelan speaks like the senior officer he was. He gives instructions with timeline, deliverable, and contingency. He answers questions if they are operationally relevant and declines to speculate beyond his authority. He is competent and unembellished.

social_block.motivation: tactical errands Preston has authorized; assessment of subordinate captains; Hudson-pass route security

hooks: tactical mission briefing on Preston's behalf
the player witnesses Whelan's quiet preparations
retinue captain dispute requires arbitration
Hudson-pass anomaly requires investigation

npcs.voice: Amar is courteous and exact. Within seven meters of her, lying becomes strenuous. She uses this lightly — she does not interrogate; she simply lets the field do its work. She speaks in soft, level tones. She is one of the few Throne figures who occasionally smiles.

social_block.motivation: delicate hall-business errands; tributary negotiations she cannot conduct personally

hooks: Amar requests a delicate tributary negotiation
the player needs to lie within her field and must find a workaround
she warns privately about a Throne internal matter
she requests escort for a Throne-loyalist child to Mount Tremper

Marshal Thomas Whelan knows: the retinue would likely follow him if Preston dies; he has not solicited this

Beatrice Amar knows: the truth-zone effect's limits

The Catskill Throne is pursuing: negotiating with Warped leaders (Grey-on-Grey wolf, Grey Walker bear)

The Tower Lords of Brooklyn is pursuing: quiet succession jockeying (38% 5-year leadership-change probability per Lord)

The Philadelphia Bourse is pursuing: covert backing of Central Jersey League, Species I Reyes-kin, Delmarva Harvest Lords

The South Philly Holding is pursuing: fortifying Navy Yard perimeter

Central Jersey League is pursuing: formal Warped diplomacy (Warped relations subcommittee; White Horse of Princeton treaty)

Lehigh Principalities is pursuing: quiet arrangement with Old Badger (T8 warped, npc-old-badger) for territorial boundary

The Crabclaw Confederation is pursuing: Inner Harbor lord courting Dundalk to prevent Towson alliance

The Delmarva Harvest Lords is pursuing: Bourse relationship management

Species I Diaspora is pursuing: negotiating with Fed Continuity for formal territorial recognition

The Flushing-Edison Cluster (Species C) is pursuing: formalizing Bourse commercial relationship

The North Jersey Hs (Species H) is pursuing: quiet arms accumulation

The Three Judges (Yonkers governing council) is pursuing: apprentice expansion

Colonel James Preston knows: Warped pre-cycle theology (takes it seriously)

environmental_detail: The site was a Cold War continuity-of-government bunker built into the mountain above the town. Preston seized it in the first month; his first act of governance was to reinforce its walls. A Species C artisan extended the audience hall with matter-manipulated stone that does not weather. The hall smells of cold air and machine oil. Preston rarely appears in it. Outside, the approach road is patrolled at three checkpoints. Visitors who pass the checkpoints are received at the outer barracks and processed through a series of formalities before the audience chamber. The formalities are not intimidation — they are calibration, and Whelan and Amar run them together.
Current event: recent visit from Grey Walker emissary

Marshal Thomas Whelan wants: tactical errands Preston has authorized; assessment of subordinate captains; Hudson-pass route security
Beatrice Amar wants: delicate hall-business errands; tributary negotiations she cannot conduct personally

narrator_payload.format_instructions: Narrate what happened (the engine's outcome). Describe all applied consequences and complications. Do NOT soften outcomes. Do NOT describe cooperation beyond disposition bounds. End on what invites the next action.
